case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. IVANIA TAPIA et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
POS OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TAPIA, IVANIA

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATIONS OF VENUE AND REDUCED FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TAPIA, IVANIA DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-16-2013

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAPIA, IVANIA $1,236.10 PRINCIPAL, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,472.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO RIVERSIDE COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TAPIA, IVANIA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $236.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $180.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TAPIA, IVANIA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED JUN-25-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TAPIA, IVANIA
DECLARATION RE COMPIANCE WITH CCP 1033(B)(2); WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO RIVERSIDE COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT TAPIA, IVANIA
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TAPIA, IVANIA
